backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types and CRUD operations for user profiles, NGOs, and food donations, with role-based access control via AccessControl and MixinAuthorization mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state from an old schema (NGOs only) to a new schema by adding an empty foodDonations list.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping completed feature IDs (route/nav removals and food listing action buttons) to the files they affect, their component dependencies, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing each file's purpose and notable changes such as removed routes, updated hooks, and footer cleanup.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main.tsx entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining six routes (Home, Donate, Request Help, Volunteer, Food Listings, NGO Register) wrapped in a shared layout with Navigation, Footer, and Toaster — Dashboard and Admin routes are absent.
frontend/src/components/BackgroundWrappe: Layout wrapper that renders a fixed full-viewport food background image with a dark overlay and backdrop blur, placing all child content above it in a flex column.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Minimal site footer displaying only the current year and ByteMeal copyright notice, centered inside a glassmorphism bar.
frontend/src/components/GlassCard.tsx: Reusable card component that applies either standard or strong glassmorphism CSS utility classes, with an optional className override prop.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive glassmorphism navbar with six links (Home, Donate Food, Get Help, Food Listings, Volunteer, NGO Register), active-link highlighting, and a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on food donations (backend), assistance requests, volunteers, NGOs, and other entities, mixing backend actor calls with in-memory client-side stores.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for the ByteMeal brand color system, and declares reusable utility classes like glass-card, btn-orange, and text-gradient variants.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single cn utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminNGOApproval.tsx: Admin page that lists NGO registration requests and allows approving or rejecting them, displaying status badges and loading/error states using GlassCard components.
frontend/src/pages/AssistanceRequestForm: Form page that lets NGOs or individuals submit food assistance requests with validation, using the useAddAssistanceRequest mutation and displaying success/error toasts.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page component (content truncated/empty in provided source).
frontend/src/pages/DonorForm.tsx: A form page for submitting food donations, collecting donor name, food items, quantity, and pickup location, with validation and mutation via useAddFoodDonation hook.
frontend/src/pages/FoodListings.tsx: Displays a list of food donations as cards with status badges, and allows NGOs to accept or mark donations as collected using mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page for ByteMeal featuring a hero section with CTA buttons to donate or request food, and a features grid explaining how the platform works.
frontend/src/pages/NGORegistrationForm.t: A registration form for NGOs to join the ByteMeal platform, collecting organization details and assistance type, submitted via the useAddNGO mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/VolunteerForm.tsx: A volunteer sign-up form collecting name, email, phone, location, and preferred role, submitted via the useAddVolunteer mutation hook with validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, persisting, and cleaning URL parameters, supporting both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback for persistence.
frontend/standalone/admin-ngo-approval.h: Admin panel page for reviewing and managing NGO registration requests, displaying summary stats (total, pending, approved, rejected) and a grid of NGO cards with approve/reject actions.
frontend/standalone/assistance-form.html: HTML form page allowing users to submit food assistance requests, collecting recipient name, number of people, urgency level, and contact information.
frontend/standalone/dashboard.html: Dashboard page displaying live platform statistics (donations, assistance requests, volunteers, NGOs, claimed meals) and panels for recent donations, requests, and registered volunteers.
frontend/standalone/donor-form.html: HTML form page for food donors to submit surplus food donations, collecting food item, quantity, unit, and donor name/ID details.
frontend/standalone/food-listings.html: Displays a browsable grid of available food donations for the ByteMeal app, dynamically populated from localStorage with expiry status badges and a link to add new donations.
frontend/standalone/index.html: The ByteMeal homepage featuring a hero section, live stats counters (donations, requests, volunteers, NGOs), and a feature overview of how the platform works.
frontend/standalone/ngo-registration.htm: A registration form for NGOs to join the ByteMeal network, collecting organization name, contact details, address, and other required fields with inline validation.
frontend/standalone/script.js: Shared utility script for all ByteMeal standalone pages, providing mobile nav toggling, toast notifications, form validation helpers, button loading states, and localStorage CRUD helpers for donations, requests, volunteers, and NGOs.
frontend/standalone/styles.css: Global design system stylesheet for ByteMeal using a dark glassmorphism theme, defining CSS custom properties, resets, navigation, layout containers, cards, forms, buttons, and responsive utilities.
frontend/standalone/volunteer-form.html: Standalone HTML page for the ByteMeal volunteer registration form, including fields for name, email, phone, location, preferred role, and availability, with glassmorphism styling and a full navigation bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining custom color tokens (using oklch), fonts, border radii, shadows, and enabling plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 21) describing ByteMeal's architecture, existing features, known issues, and design decisions, serving as a persistent record for build planning and AI context.
